acceptance_criteria.evidence: Explicit --route-profile values are preserved verbatim in cld and cdx full/quick prompt and Phase 0 parameter text even with conflicting ambient env values; child CLD_ROUTE_PROFILE remains empty.

bin/cld and bin/cdx no longer export or read CLD_ROUTE_PROFILE/CDX_DEFAULT_ROUTE_PROFILE for route resolution; inherited legacy env values are sanitized before child launch and negative tests verify empty child env.
cld now defaults both -b and -bq to cld-default; cdx defaults both -b and -bq to cdx-composer; both defaults are passed explicitly as route-profile parameters.

Full and quick route-profile tests were updated for both launchers, conflicting ambient env negative cases were added, source-level no-export/no-read assertions were added, and launcher/docs/changelog wording now describes parameter-only threading.

commits.message: test(CL-6n0a): red - assert parameter-only route profiles
feat(CL-6n0a): green - make route profiles parameter-only

tests.command: PYTHONPATH=/Users/malte/code/library/meta/.claude/worktrees/bead-CL-6n0a/.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages UV_CACHE_DIR=/private/tmp/uv-cache uv run pytest tests/test_route_profiles_schema.py tests/test_cdx_bead_workflow.py tests/test_cld_single_bead_contract.py tests/test_launcher_permission_modes.py -v
tests.result: red: 12 failed, 127 passed before implementation; green: 139 passed after implementation

downstream_impacts: Phase 0 receives route profile authority only through explicit --route-profile CLI parameters.
Child processes launched by cld/cdx no longer receive inherited CLD_ROUTE_PROFILE or CDX_DEFAULT_ROUTE_PROFILE values from the launcher environment.
